title: DDI-CDI Activity
description: DDI-CDI Activity class (DDICDILibrary/Classes/Process/Activity). Describes tasks at a conceptual level using cdi:Activity, cdi:Step, and cdi:Parameter vocabulary from the DDI Cross-Domain Integration specification. Includes definition, start/end timestamps, hasInternal (ControlLogic), and full Step/Parameter support.
